title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a tiny core (read, write, edit, bash) and an extension system. It works with various language models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, and includes npm/git-based extensions, custom skill support, and prompt template tuning.
